scripts.migrate:vercel: if [ "$VERCEL" = "1" ] && [ "$VERCEL_ENV" = "production" ]; then if [ -n "$SUPABASE_DB_URL" ]; then echo "Running Supabase migrations on Vercel Production" && npx supabase@latest db push --db-url "$SUPABASE_DB_URL"; else echo "Skipping Supabase migration: SUPABASE_DB_URL is missing"; fi; else echo "Skipping Supabase migration (not Vercel Production)"; fi
